title: Initial Parameter Estimation Workflow for ARIMA Models
description: A flowchart outlining the sequential steps and methods used to obtain initial estimates for the parameters (p, d, q) of an ARIMA model before formal optimization.
relationships: Data is analyzed to determine the order of differencing (d) needed for stationarity
The ACF plot is used to suggest the initial order for the Moving Average (MA) component (q)
The PACF plot is used to suggest the initial order for the Autoregressive (AR) component (p)
The suggested p, d, and q values are used to form the initial parameter guesses for the model
